steps.title: Identify the role of the coefficient
steps.content: The formula converts kelvins to Fahrenheit. Substitute $h=440.65$ and isolate the fraction: $$440.65-10=\frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $512.4$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $512.4$ is the value to enter.
